pi_items.source: Found in setup_task.sh where PROJECT_DIR is defined and directory is created.
Found in setup_task.sh within the generated docker-compose.yml under services.app.container_name.
Found in setup_task.sh where main.py hardcodes dependencies and docker-compose.yml defines container names postgres-db, redis-cache, and auth-service.
Found in setup_task.sh where main.py prints this string upon successful connection to all dependencies.

privileged_info_summary: The task takes place in the '/home/ga/legacy-migration' directory. The application container is named 'legacy-app'. The application requires network aliases to be configured for three dependency containers: 'postgres-db' must be aliased to 'db.inventory.local', 'redis-cache' to 'cache.inventory.local', and 'auth-service' to 'auth.provider.external'. Upon successful configuration, the application will output 'All systems go! Application started.' in its logs.
